prompt: Ultra-cinematic surreal architectural photography of a 60-story skyscraper in a futuristic Tokyo cityscape where the entire building is constructed of 60 enormous stacked cats — each cat the size of a full floor, alternating tabby orange + black + white + grey fur, eyes wide open looking forward, real glowing windows cut into their fur, tiny balconies on each cat's chest, tiny people commuting up exterior staircases that run along the cats' tails, miniature drone deliveries flying around. Sunset golden hour with warm orange light. Tiny normal-sized buildings around for scale. Dramatic low-angle wide architectural shot, the cat-tower dominating the frame. NO TEXT, NO OVERLAYS, NO LOGOS. 9:16 vertical, 8K hyper-realistic surreal architecture photography.
